title: GDP Week Order Block Setup That Funded Traders Watch (2026)
description: Before the GDP release hits, smart money is already positioned. Here's the exact order block and FVG setup R2F Trading uses to catch the move before the crowd even reacts. Watch before your next trade. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily setups.
script: Stop. GDP drops in 48 hours. And smart money already placed their order. Here's the exact block they used on DXY. Price swept buyside liquidity at this swing high. Classic trap. Retail went long — right into smart money's sell. Right after the sweep — a bearish order block formed. Three candles. Last up-close before the drop. That's your level. Price left a fair value gap on the way down. A 47-pip gap. Unfilled. That's a magnet. That's where price returns. Price retraced into the order block — tapped the FVG — and the R2F Trading system confirmed the entry. Short. Price dropped 110 pips into the weekly target. No gambling. No guessing. Structure told the whole story before GDP even printed. This is how the R2F Trading system reads GDP week every quarter. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every single day.
